---
title: "Martha Collins"
---

## Martha Collins

**Dates:** (b. 1805/6-?1880)

**Maiden name:** (Andrews)

### Description

postmistress

### Biography

She was the wife of George Collins (b. 1818/9), of the Post Office, Otterbourne, groom and gardener, and mother of George (b. 1839/40),  Charles (b.1840/1), Olive (b.1841/2), Elizabeth (Bessie) who was one of Mary Anne Dyson\'s pupils, and Anne (b. 1846/7). [1861 census]   It is not unlikely that she was also the person,  referred to only as Martha, who worked in Misselbrook\'s shop.

### Letters

- Letter from Jan 29th [1896]
- Letter from Decr 4th 1867
- Letter from May 28th 1861
- Letter from February 25, 1854.
- Letter from January 15, 1853.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
